entry.title: The credit check is not preformed for the sales scheduling agreement
entry.content:
We have configured the credit check for Sales order - scope item BD9. However when we create a scheduling agreement the credit check status is 'Not Performed'. How do we setup the credit check for scope item 3NR?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Payment medium without payment advices
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in need of the following. We need to get the file to send to the Bank in a diferente moment from the moment we send the payment advices to vendors

So we  would like to know how  we can obtain the payment method in the F110 transaction without sending payment notices by email

Is this possible?

Thank you in advance

João

entry.title: slow-moving indicator - wrong value
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

during SAP public cloud implementation we found differences in Slow or Non-moving materials app.

Based on the SAP help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/276b1b645ec64e808e430b363d6efd6b.html?profile=20087413&source=productlink-webassistant the value for slow-moving indicator should be 5,49. But in the system, we have value 5,14.

Qcons = 45

Qstock = 19955

NOdays = 15

 

Do you have any ideas about what could cause these differences?

entry.title: Grants Management GMDERIVE is not working, system is not creating actual documents for Grant Budget
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I have configured GM-GTE; I am able to create all master data of FM GM, the budget as well. Accounting docs also post to ledger 90. Update types are good
GM derivation created but not working
system is not creating actuals for sponsors classes. Or system is not consuming budget or Actuals (EXP/REV) are not updating in Grants Management, and there is no error. Trace on GMDERIVE is also not working

entry.title: Transaction to update DD07T
entry.content:
Hi 

How can I update data of DD07T data? Are there a DD07T transaction ?

/SAPPCE/JV_OBJ_TYP view not exist in my sap version .

entry.title: Export/Transport saved view and bookmarks
entry.content:
Hello

For S/4 HANA Cloud users, functionalities such as "Save Filter Bar Settings (Views) and Save the Results Table" and "Graphical Display Settings (Bookmarks)" are offered as SAP Help below.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/e31447c4fcb34619bc1c605786946653.html?locale=en-US

As I checked Export Software Collection App and Export Customizing Transports App, it seems that saved Views and Bookmarks are not able to be exported or transported to Test/Production system. So a customer have to maintain views and bookmarks in every client as manual rework. Is my understanding correct? or Is there any way to export/import those?

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

entry.title: Migrate to new asset accounting within ECC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are currently running classic asset accounting on ECC EHP18 SP1 and will convert into new asset accounting in the very same system release before migrating to S/4HANA.

Prior to moving to new asset accounting  we will migrate to New GL in ECC and eventually to S/4HANA.

My query relates to the effect on existing data at the time we switch from classic accounting to new asset accounting.

I am questioning the SAP's statement below on the effect of existing data after we have activated new asset accounting: knowing that we will implement New GL + ledger accounting, how are the cumulated APC and depreciation values transferred to ledger 0L at least after the new asset accounting is activated?

Should we engage in a migration plan  or not ?

If yes what are the steps aside activating  Financials Extension (EA-FIN), business function FI-AA, Parallel Valuation (FIN_AA_PARALLEL_VAL), FI-GL, Change in Leading Valuation (FIN_GL_CHNGE_LDG_VAL) and performing the required customizing steps to migrate the APC and depreciation values from classic asset accounting to the new model ? The guidance in that matter provided in the SAP portal (documentation) only relates to a migration to new asset accounting in S/4HANA, which does not apply here.

The Release Notes for SAP enhancement package 7 for SAP ERP 6.0, SP 2 of the business function FI_AA_PARALLEL_VAL reads the following:

'Effects on Existing Data.

 Existing Data Existing master data, transaction data and Customizing data is not changed by activating the business function or the Customizing switch. 

I searched for OSS  relevant notes and documentation on this matter and could not find any additional guidance to answer my query.

Thank you for sharing any insight and experience to assist.

Kind regards,

Vincent OTMANI

entry.title: Description Change for Special GL Indicator S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to change the description for special GL indicators in S4Hana public cloud. Standard SAP provided "P - Payment Request" i would like to change the description.

Is it possible to do the above changes in S4Hana public cloud. If yes, kindly arrange the procedure.

entry.title: Custom field for Accounting Master Data - Internal Order
entry.content:
Dear Community

new Custom field for (Accounting) Master data on Internal Order is not becoming visible while creating a new master record (through Manage Internal Orders - Fiori App) after enabling and publishing the new field. Any steps additionally to Custom Fields Fiori app, like running an update program in with GUI transaction?

Kindly advise.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Bulgaria moving to EURO
entry.content:
Hi everybody 

it seems almost sure that Bulgaria is moving to eurozone in Jan 2025.

We have a company code active in S4/HANA 2022 with currency BGN. I would like to know if there are any options to convert it to EUR or if the only option is to open a new company code in EUR and transfer all items into it.

thanks #bgn #eur #eurozone #2025 #bulgaria

entry.title: Getting an error when opening Fiori apps in a custom role.
entry.content:
Hello!

We have created a custom business role including the below 2 apps and we are faced with an error "Set only one date range for key date restriction in the user role." when we try to click "GO" in the apps.

F0711 Manage Customer Line Items

F0712 Manage Supplier Line Items

I haven't touched any value related to key date restriction while creating the role so I have no idea how this error is caused.

I would appreciate it if there is any solution for this error.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Fujita

entry.title: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
We required the functionality to retire the assets in mass.

entry.title: Required the mass retirement of assets functionality
entry.content:
We required the functionality to retire the assets in mass.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change material type KMAT to HALB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to change the material type KMAT to HALB. I've set for deletion and archived all purchase orders and also removed the stock from the material sending the stock for other material and/or scrapping the stock. But for some reason the batch number remains in the material. When I try to change the material type in MMAM t-code the message was shown:

The material type cannot be changed.

The reasons for this are:

There are independent valuation segments that are not permitted in the new material type. You must archive them first.

ValArea ValType
ZA010000822817
ZA010000822818
ZA010000822819
ZA010000822820
ZA010000822821
ZA010000822822
ZA010000822823
ZA010000822824
ZA010000833242

After that I've set deletion flag for all batches (valuation types) in MSC2N t-code and tried to archived them in SARA t-code, the following messages was shown:

MCH1: Material  0000822817 dependent batch records exist

MCHB: Material ZA01 ZA01 0000822817 unrestricted-use stock exists for previous period.

Can anyone suggest how to proceed?

Regards,

Christian Lima

entry.title: my fb50 did not appear posting period and and document type, kindly guide
entry.content: Im having hard time to do adjustment in FB50 because layout in my FB50 did not appear posting period and Document type display

entry.title: FULL list of Payment terms for Customer
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know what is transaction code for to view the full list of payment terms for our customer?

entry.title: Is it possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries
entry.content:
--- Product/Function ---
No predicted product
User selected product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Recent)
No predicted product function
User selected product function: SAP S/4HANA Cloud > Finance > Accounting and Financial Close > General Ledger Accounting > Reporting and Analysis (Recommended)
Predicted component: FI-FIO-GL (Product Function)

--- TagID/AreaID ---
TagID: #3
AreaID: 00109B36D6221EDBB0C0294B431680E8

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use these Steps to Reproduce, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

--- Description ---

Hi,dear teams

I'm facing a issue that it is possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries?
As we all know,the secondary cost element can't be posted directly in general.
Please kindly check the attachment.

But once on my previous On-Premise project,I remember that it can be acheieved by configurating some points.
So I wonder it is also possible to do the same on S4HC?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Regarding restrictions when referring to document type "SC"
entry.content:
I would like to use the general journal posting app to record BS accounts in different profit centers for each item.
To do this, we would like to use the document type "SC" instead of the document type "SA" to create documents for normal posting documents as well, since we will be splitting the documents.

If the above measures are taken, could you please let me know if there are any apps that will no longer be usable or if there are any restrictions?

entry.title: Email F150 Dunning letters after reviewing
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

May I know if there is a way to email the dunning letters after reviewing them? 

We have a requirement to view the dunning letters before emailing to exclude some from the mailing list because some customers may have settled their accounts and are not updated. In such cases, their dunning letters shouldn't be emailed.

entry.title: How can I increase document number input in open item selection in FB05 from 10 to 20 rows
entry.content: What is the process to increase number of rows. I have only 10 rows. Want to increase same to atleast 20. Have seen few screenshots online where certain users have 27 to 28 rows in FB05
